notes: Single self-contained HTML, no libraries. Golden-hour sunset sky with vertical gradient (deep navy → indigo → magenta → amber horizon), warm sun disc with multi-stop radial glow, subtle upper-band stars, drifting puff clouds (3-ellipse puffs with warm rim), 6 flapping birds, two mountain ranges (far = lighter purple with snow-cap highlights, mid = darker purple), rolling-hill silhouette, 60-item tree band with 3 silhouettes (pine / round / tall), 16 roadside poles with warm lamp glow + occasional curve/speed signs, perspective road with scrolling center dashes, side tufts. Car: red body, dark cabin, windshield reflection, headlight cone, tail-light glow, spinning 5-spoke wheels, body bob + pitch tied to road speed. DPR-aware, dt-based, modular scroll with seamless wrap on each layer.
